reason: Check every requested supported subagent capability and hygiene criterion.
Check canonical event evidence, provider routing, and any required source-fix gates.
Check installed hya-ts runtime and real PTY evidence.
Check model-to-tool-to-event-to-TUI data flow rather than model self-report.
Check resident lifecycle, budgets, wake behavior, and quiescence.
Check real PTY observation and single-input behavior.
